get.summary: Reads all selected set codes and code groups of catalog type.
get.description: Reads all codes and their code groups that are contained in plant-specific selected sets. You can retrieve administration data and valuation data.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter items by property values, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Order items by property values, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select properties to be returned, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

get.summary: Reads a specific selected set code of catalog type.
get.description: Reads a specific code that is contained in a plant-specific selected set. You can retrieve administration data and valuation data.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select properties to be returned, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

post.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Processing (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/batch-processing/).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET A_InspectionCatalog HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

count.description: The number of entities in the collection. Available when using the $inlinecount query option, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/).

innererror.description: The structure of this object is service-specific

top.name: $top
top.description: Show only the first n items, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

skip.name: $skip
skip.description: Skip the first n items, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

count.name: $inlinecount
count.description: Include count of items, see [URI Conventions (OData Version 2.0)](https://www.odata.org/documentation/odata-version-2-0/uri-conventions/)

apply.name: $apply
apply.description: Apply basic grouping and aggregation functionality, see [Aggregation](http://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata-data-aggregation-ext/v4.0/odata-data-aggregation-ext-v4.0.html)
